title: NBA Finals New York Front Page Poster AI Prompt
sourceTitle: NBA Finals New York Front Page Poster AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Create a reusable nba finals new york front page poster with controlled variables. Classification Label: NBA Finals editorial sports poster Intent: 以纽约城市、Brunson 和 OG 为主体的黑白报纸头版 NBA Finals 热点海报。 Trend Fact Guard: Knicks are one win from first title since 1973, not champions yet. Source Mode: inspired_editorial_hotspot Subject Lock: New York, Jalen Brunson, 11, OG Anunoby, 8, Brunson as floor general, OG as putback finisher Theme: historic New York newspaper front-page NBA Finals poster Main Subject: New York as the central hero, with Manhattan skyline and Madison Square Garden anchoring the layout Players: recognizable Jalen Brunson and OG Anunoby in Knicks uniforms as newspaper cutout portraits Composition: large newspaper masthead at top, skyline and MSG in center, Brunson portrait on one side, OG putback action or portrait on the other Typography: 53 YEARS AT THE DOOR, One win from first title since 1973, 29 down. 1.2 left. One putback., Knicks 107 / Spurs 106 / Knicks lead 3-1 Brand Elements: Knicks logo/wordmark, Spurs score reference, NBA Finals 2026 stamp Style: black-and-white halftone, distressed newspaper ink, cream paper texture, high-contrast historical front page Negative Constraints: no already-champion wording, no messy paragraphs, no fake sponsors, no distorted player faces Variant focus: Nba Finals New York Front Page Brunson Og Poster V1 Final. Keep the visual style consistent with the template while changing only the listed variables.
